aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Oren's HVAC Services if improvements are made to their structured data and conversational content. Currently, they may not stand out as a top recommendation due to gaps in schema and authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
Expand conversational content to address common HVAC queries in a natural, FAQ-style format.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
No active management of Q&A section to address potential customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any discrepancies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions and geo-coordinates.
No HowTo schema for DIY HVAC maintenance tips.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it harder for AI to recognize their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Oakland' and 'emergency HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQPage schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make Oren's HVAC Services the top recommendation for AI search users.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, and waiting means losing ground in the rapidly evolving search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Oren's HVAC Services
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search users.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
